title: Premier League action this past weekend
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United and Sussex were both back on the winning side in the four matches in the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league that was concluded the past weekend.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United and Sussex were both back on the winning side in the four matches in the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league that was concluded the past weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp (70/3) won by seven wickets after the defending champions dismissed Union Stars I for only 69. Enathi Kitshini (6/16) was in great form for Pacaltsdorp and as they surpassed the winning runs in only 13.1 overs they also gained an important bonus point.","html":"Pacaltsdorp (70/3) won by seven wickets after the defending champions dismissed Union Stars I for only 69. Enathi Kitshini (6/16) was in great form for Pacaltsdorp and as they surpassed the winning runs in only 13.1 overs they also gained an important bonus point."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sussex, who had back-to-back trips to Oudtshoorn also dismissed Union Stars II cheaply (100 all out) with Ravin-Lee Kemmies (3/45) the top performer with the ball for Sussex. The D’Almeida-based team chased down the winning runs (103/4) in the 31st over for a 6-wicket bonus point victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers (123 all out) remain winless and at the bottom of the log after they could not master the Knysna Cavaliers bowling attack of Francois Bonthuys (5/21) and Jarred Jardine (3/22). Cavaliers won the Bitou derby after they reached the target (124/4 in the 33rd over) for a 6-wicket bonus point victory.","html":"Plett Pioneers (123 all out) remain winless and at the bottom of the log after they could not master the Knysna Cavaliers bowling attack of Francois Bonthuys (5/21) and Jarred Jardine (3/22). Cavaliers won the Bitou derby after they reached the target (124/4 in the 33rd over) for a 6-wicket bonus point victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George (110/1 in 13.5 overs) was too strong for Harlequins (106 all out) and recorded a nine wickets bonus point victory. For George Werner Botha (49) and Cobus Snyman (45) excelled with the bat while Shelby Lindique (3/4) and Kelly Smuts (3/20) each bagged three wickets for George.","html":"George (110/1 in 13.5 overs) was too strong for Harlequins (106 all out) and recorded a nine wickets bonus point victory. For George Werner Botha (49) and Cobus Snyman (45) excelled with the bat while Shelby Lindique (3/4) and Kelly Smuts (3/20) each bagged three wickets for George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards:","html":"The summarised scorecards:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George vs Harlequins Forces","html":"George vs Harlequins Forces"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Harlequins Forces 106 all out - 26.4 overs (Marco Jansen 33, Jermaine le Kay 30, Shelby Lindique 3/4, Kelly Smuts 3/20, Cobus Snyman 2/22) George 110/1 - 13.5 overs (Werner Botha 49, Cobus Snyman 45)","html":"Harlequins Forces 106 all out - 26.4 overs (Marco Jansen 33, Jermaine le Kay 30, Shelby Lindique 3/4, Kelly Smuts 3/20, Cobus Snyman 2/22) George 110/1 - 13.5 overs (Werner Botha 49, Cobus Snyman 45)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George won by 9 wickets.","html":"George won by 9 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars I","html":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars I"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars I 69 all out - 23.4 overs (Enathi Kiitshini 6/16, Grant Simpson 2/15) Pacaltsdorp United 70/3 - 13.1 overs (Kurt Botha 25)","html":"Union Stars I 69 all out - 23.4 overs (Enathi Kiitshini 6/16, Grant Simpson 2/15) Pacaltsdorp United 70/3 - 13.1 overs (Kurt Botha 25)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United won by 7 wickets.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United won by 7 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Plett Pioneers","html":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Plett Pioneers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers 123 all out - 35.4 overs (Tyrese Karelse 37, Francois Bonthuys 5/21, Jarred Jardine 3/22) Knysna Cavaliers 124/4 - 32.1 overs (Keelan Gossayn 40, AB van der Walt 30*, Ruan Terblanche 25, Eden Tarentaal 2/26)","html":"Plett Pioneers 123 all out - 35.4 overs (Tyrese Karelse 37, Francois Bonthuys 5/21, Jarred Jardine 3/22) Knysna Cavaliers 124/4 - 32.1 overs (Keelan Gossayn 40, AB van der Walt 30*, Ruan Terblanche 25, Eden Tarentaal 2/26)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 6 wickets.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 6 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars II vs Sussex","html":"Union Stars II vs Sussex"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars II 100 all out - 29.3 overs (Ravin Lee Kemmies 3/45, Rowan Groenewald 2/11, Geronovan Erasmus 2/12)","html":"Union Stars II 100 all out - 29.3 overs (Ravin Lee Kemmies 3/45, Rowan Groenewald 2/11, Geronovan Erasmus 2/12)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex 103/4 (30.2 overs) (Johandré Barnard 41, Heath Richards 22*, Thomas Kaber 2/33)","html":"Sussex 103/4 (30.2 overs) (Johandré Barnard 41, Heath Richards 22*, Thomas Kaber 2/33)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex won by 6 wickets.","html":"Sussex won by 6 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
